Appearances:
Plaintiff Murphy Investments is present. Represented by Jackie Lecue.
Attorney Marina Franco appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lisardo Molina Panells is present.
Attorney Seth Schreiberg representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-19-2011 remains on calendar.
